title: Elbaf Opens — Chapter 1130
main_description: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 139 cleaned dialogue lines.
key_events: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
The display-ready parts preserve cleaned dialogue while uncertain speakers remain clearly marked.
